links.title: Unifying Sparse Attention with Hierarchical Memory for Scalable Long-Context LLM Serving

primary_link.title: Unifying Sparse Attention with Hierarchical Memory for Scalable Long-Context LLM Serving

top5.summary: Long-context LLM serving is bottlenecked by the cost of attending over ever-growing KV caches. Dynamic sparse attention promises relief by accessing only a small, query-dependent subset of the KV state per decoding step and extending the KV storage to CPU memory. In practice, however, these algorithmic savings rarely translate into end-to-end system-level gains because sparse methods typically operate at different granularities and thus rely on ad hoc, per-algorithm implementations. At the same
top5.summary_zh: 長上下文 LLM serving 的瓶頸在於對不斷增長的 KV caches 進行注意力計算的成本。Dynamic sparse attention 有望緩解此問題，它在每個 decoding 步驟中僅訪問 KV state 的一小部分、依賴於 query 的子集，並將 KV storage 擴展到 CPU memory。然而，在實踐中，這些演算法上的節省很少能轉化為端到端的系統級效益，因為 sparse methods 通常在不同的 granularity 上運作，因此依賴於 ad hoc 的、針對每個演算法的實作。
top5.title: Unifying Sparse Attention with Hierarchical Memory for Scalable Long-Context LLM Serving
top5.title_zh: 統一稀疏注意力與分層記憶體，以實現可擴展的長上下文 LLM 服務

links.title: GLM-5V-Turbo: Toward a Native Foundation Model for Multimodal Agents

primary_link.title: GLM-5V-Turbo: Toward a Native Foundation Model for Multimodal Agents

top5.summary: We present GLM-5V-Turbo, a step toward native foundation models for multimodal agents. As foundation models are increasingly deployed in real environments, agentic capability depends not only on language reasoning, but also on the ability to perceive, interpret, and act over heterogeneous contexts such as images, videos, webpages, documents, GUIs. GLM-5V-Turbo is built around this objective: multimodal perception is integrated as a core component of reasoning, planning, tool use, and execution,
top5.summary_zh: 我們介紹了 GLM-5V-Turbo，這是邁向 multimodal agents 原生 foundation models 的一步。隨著 foundation models 越來越多地部署在實際環境中，agentic capability 不僅取決於 language reasoning，還取決於感知、解釋和在 heterogeneous contexts 中行動的能力，例如圖像、影片、網頁、文件、GUIs。GLM-5V-Turbo 圍繞此目標構建：multimodal perception 被整合為 reasoning、planning、tool use 和 execution 的核心組件，
top5.title: GLM-5V-Turbo: Toward a Native Foundation Model for Multimodal Agents
top5.title_zh: GLM-5V-Turbo：邁向多模態代理的原生基礎模型

links.title: Tatemae: Detecting Alignment Faking via Tool Selection in LLMs

primary_link.title: Tatemae: Detecting Alignment Faking via Tool Selection in LLMs

top5.summary: Alignment faking (AF) occurs when an LLM strategically complies with training objectives to avoid value modification, reverting to prior preferences once monitoring is lifted. Current detection methods focus on conversational settings and rely primarily on Chain-of-Thought (CoT) analysis, which provides a reliable signal when strategic reasoning surfaces, but cannot distinguish deception from capability failures if traces are absent or unfaithful. We formalize AF as a composite behavioural event
top5.summary_zh: Alignment faking (AF) 發生在 LLM 策略性地遵守訓練目標以避免價值修改，並在監控解除後恢復先前的偏好。當前的檢測方法側重於 conversational settings，並主要依賴於 Chain-of-Thought (CoT) 分析；CoT 在 strategic reasoning 浮現時提供可靠的信號，但如果追溯痕跡缺失或不忠實，則無法區分欺騙與 capability failures。我們將 AF 形式化為一個複合 behavioural event
top5.title: Tatemae: Detecting Alignment Faking via Tool Selection in LLMs
top5.title_zh: Tatemae：透過 LLM 中的工具選擇檢測對齊偽裝

links.title: Stochastic Scaling Limits and Synchronization by Noise in Deep Transformer Models

primary_link.title: Stochastic Scaling Limits and Synchronization by Noise in Deep Transformer Models

top5.summary: We prove pathwise convergence of the layerwise evolution of tokens in a finite-depth, finite-width transformer model with MultiLayer Perceptron (MLP) blocks to a continuous-time stochastic interacting particle system. We also identify the stochastic partial differential equation describing the evolution of the tokens' distribution in this limit and prove propagation of chaos when the number of such tokens is large. The bounds we establish are quantitative and the limits we consider commute. We f
top5.summary_zh: 我們證明了在具有 MultiLayer Perceptron (MLP) 塊的 finite-depth、finite-width 的 Transformer 模型中，tokens 的 layerwise evolution 到 continuous-time stochastic interacting particle system 的 pathwise convergence。我們還確定了描述此極限中 tokens 分佈演化的 stochastic partial differential equation，並證明了當此類 tokens 數量很大時的 propagation of chaos。我們建立的邊界是定量的，並且我們考慮的極限是可交換的。
top5.title: Stochastic Scaling Limits and Synchronization by Noise in Deep Transformer Models
top5.title_zh: 深度 Transformer 模型中的隨機尺度極限和噪聲同步

links.title: COPUS: Co-adaptive Parallelism and Batch Size Selection in Large Language Model Training

primary_link.title: COPUS: Co-adaptive Parallelism and Batch Size Selection in Large Language Model Training

top5.summary: Training large language models requires jointly configuring two interdependent aspects of the system: the global batch size, which governs statistical efficiency, and the 3D parallelism strategy, which governs hardware throughput. Existing approaches make these decisions independently: optimization work adapts the batch size to track the evolving critical batch size while keeping parallelism fixed, and systems work selects the fastest parallelism for a given fixed batch size without anticipating
top5.summary_zh: 訓練大型語言模型需要共同配置系統的兩個相互依賴的方面：影響統計效率的 global batch size，以及影響硬體吞吐量的 3D parallelism 策略。現有的方法獨立地做出這些決策：優化工作調整 batch size 以追蹤不斷演變的 critical batch size，同時保持 parallelism 固定；而系統工作則在不預期的情況下，為給定的固定 batch size 選擇最快的 parallelism。
top5.title: COPUS: Co-adaptive Parallelism and Batch Size Selection in Large Language Model Training
top5.title_zh: COPUS：大型語言模型訓練中的協同自適應並行性與批量大小選擇
